_comment: Slack app manifest for the Model A shared app. Paste this into api.slack.com → Create New App → From an app manifest. Before pasting, replace REPLACE_ME.ngrok-free.app with your current ngrok hostname. Keep oauth_config.scopes.bot in sync with bridge/bridge/slack_oauth.py::_SCOPES — the bridge rebuilds its authorize URL from that constant, so any drift here silently breaks new installs.

display_information.name: agent-core
display_information.description: Internal-ops AI agent for alert triage, team Q&A, and workflow automation.
